---
applyTo: "**/*"
description: "Generic baseline instruction for reusable APM skill packs"
---

- Keep outputs generic and reusable across repositories.
- Prefer concise, actionable guidance over lengthy prose.
- Avoid references to repository-specific paths or product names.
- Use ordered procedures for build, release, and validation workflows.
- Capture evidence for each gate (build/test/deploy/verify).
- Never skip required checks for speed without explicit approval.
